title: Resolve Visualizer Complexity Debt
description:
## 📝 User Story / Description
Resolve structural quality debt and deep nesting complexity in `visualizer/main.js` and `desktop-visualizer.py`.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- Code nesting limit must pass Nomos DoD standard (Nesting level <= 3).
- Logic extracted into smaller helper functions where appropriate.

## 🛠️ Technical Notes
- Target files: `visualizer/main.js`, `desktop-visualizer.py`

## 🛡️ Rigor & Verification Boundary
- `bin/nomos verify` passes complexity limits.
